title: Safe Product Consultation Offices will be established
bodyHtml:
The General Secretariat of Uludag Exporters' Associations shared an announcement regarding "Safe Product Consultation Offices".

According to the announcement, Safe Product Consultation Offices will be established within the Product Safety Inspections Directorates located in the Customs and Foreign Trade Regional Directorates, aimed at providing technical support to companies operating in the relevant sectors of the products that fall under the responsibility of our Ministry, including textiles, footwear, toys, stationery, detergents, pacifiers, bottles, and child care products, on compliance with technical regulations.

The process of establishing the aforementioned Safe Product Consultation Offices is still ongoing, and an email address, pgd.uludag@ticaret.gov.tr, has been allocated for the use of the Regional Directorate unit for communication purposes. Personnel have been assigned to answer the questions of companies in the relevant sectors via this email address as of June 30, 2023. In addition, face-to-face briefings can be provided through the Regional Directorate connection authorities, if necessary, after the initial application via electronic communication.

Click here for the related announcement.
